author: Github
description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".
detail_describe:
拉取最新 Web Interface Guidelines 规则
读取指定文件并逐项比对
以 file:line 简洁格式输出问题
覆盖可访问性与 UX 检查
支持自定义文件或通配模式
display_description: 按 Vercel Web 界面规范审查 UI 代码合规性
name: web-design-guidelines
use_cases: [请添加网页链接] 检查这个登录页的可访问性问题
审一下首页 Hero 区是否符合设计规范 [请添加网页链接]
